UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Jackson Group Property Management is present. Represented by Nick Scarbosio.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Liam C. Murphy is present.
Attorney Christopher Walters representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Bardack, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JUL-16-2012 is vacated.
